# HarfBuzz upstream

- Project: HarfBuzz
- Source: https://github.com/harfbuzz/harfbuzz
- Version: 14.2.1
- Release archive: https://github.com/harfbuzz/harfbuzz/releases/download/14.2.1/harfbuzz-14.2.1.tar.xz
- SHA-256: `a54a5d8e9380a41fbb762ce367bcbf7704792dfca0d93f1bbca86c5a57902e0e`

The vendored `src/` directory is built through the upstream
`src/harfbuzz.cc` core-library amalgamation with `HB_TINY` for the calculator.
The upstream license is retained in `LICENSE`.
